title: Packified
description: This mod adds a full in-game resource pack editor with the ability to sync any pack changes, as well as entire packs to other players on the server.
body:
[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/LR7NbVd.png)](https://bit.ly/3FodDXy)
## Packified
Packified is a powerful and seamless in-game resource pack editor that lets you edit, add, and update textures, models, and other assets without ever leaving Minecraft! No more switching between external editors and the game. Even better, you can sync your entire resource pack with other players with a single button press, and other players can request to download your pack.

**Keep in mind**, although the mod is now out of beta, it is still incredibly complex and bound to have numerous incompatibilities with other mods. Especially rendering related mods, or mods that modify resource pack directories.

## Features:
- In-Game File Editor – Modify JSON files, textures, and more inside Minecraft.
- Sync Changes in Multiplayer – Share your modified resource packs with other players in real time.
- Full Hierarchical & Explorer-based File View – Browse and manage resource packs with an intuitive tree and folder view UI.
- Image & Model Preview – View and edit textures, models, and assets within Minecraft.
- Optimized for Modding – Works alongside other mods and supports Fabric.
- Customizable Dockable UI – Arrange and resize editor windows however you like!
  
- Live Resource Pack Updates
- Audio viewer
- 3D Model viewer/basic editor
- Image Editor
- Full backup system
- Resource pack version control (basic)
- Tools for modpack creators
- Tons of configuration options

## Perfect for:
- Resource pack creators who want to quickly test and tweak textures.
- Modders who want a simple way to modify assets on the fly.

## How It Works:
- Open Packified with a keybind (default is F8).
- Browse and select a resource pack.
- Edit JSON files, textures, or models directly in the UI.
- Apply changes and reload the pack directly in the UI
- Sync your pack changes to other players with a single button press

## Feedback:
This mod is still in active development, so there might be bugs or missing features. If there are any features that you feel like are missing from the mod, or if you find any kind of bug, make sure you report it on the mods [issues page](https://github.com/JTechGaming/Packified/issues) on the [github](https://github.com/JTechGaming/Packified).

## Known problems:
The mod seems to be incompatible with mods that change how the game loads resources such as the shared resources mod, which relocates the resourcepacks folder, and possibly some rendering mods like Immediatelyfast, but this is still being looked into.
Searching for assets in the default vanilla pack also seems to crash the game sometimes.
